metaData.Key Information:
The unmistakable full-flavour of Nescafe Classic is what makes our signature coffee so loved all over the world. Savour the wonderfully rich and refreshing aroma of this medium-dark roast. Start a day right with the first sips of this classic, let the intense taste of Nescafe Classic awaken the mind and body to new opportunities as the rich aroma of this distinctive blend unfolds. Blended quality arabica and robusta beans and then roast them to medium-dark deliciousness to deliver the pleasurable experience.
• Net weight: 200g
metaData.Preparation: 1 teaspoon of Nescafe Instant Coffee with 150g of water and add creamer, skimmed milk or sugar if desired

metaData.Key Information: Experience the finest grounded arabica and robusta beans in a cup with this unique blend of coffee. It is strong and full-bodied with a rich aroma. Drink as it is or with the amount of sugar or milk as desired. There are no preservative or artificial colouring added, an ideal drink for daily consumption.
